_meta.description: Three Bounteous shopper personas for the PPD demo. All use demo_query: 'necklace'. Replaces all prior archetype files.

personas.profile_description: First visit. No login. No purchase history. Browsing broadly. Bloomreach has no BRUID — cannot serve personalised results without cookie.
personas.plp_before_state: Bestsellers at top — generic ranking, no personalisation active
personas.plp_after_state: Bestsellers at top — Rule 3 active (is_bestseller boost for New Prospecting segment)
personas.personalisation_gap: Without BRUID, Bloomreach cannot identify this visitor across sessions. Rule 3 targets the segment but BRUID is required for cross-session recognition.

personas.profile_description: 4 sessions, browsing gift category. Searching for others, price-sensitive. Last session within 7 days. BRUID present — Bloomreach can recognise and segment her.
personas.plp_before_state: Generic ranking — Rule 1 INACTIVE, gift products buried
personas.plp_after_state: Gift sets at top — Rule 1 active (gift_eligible boost for Gifting Intent segment)
personas.personalisation_gap: BRUID present, segment assigned. Pre-fix: rule inactive so no personalisation. Post-fix: Rule 1 active, gift products surface at top.

personas.profile_description: 12 sessions, 3 purchases, AOV £220. Consistent premium browsing, new arrivals affinity. BRUID present. Bloomreach has rich signal history.
personas.plp_before_state: Generic ranking — Rule 2 INACTIVE, premium/new arrivals not surfaced
personas.plp_after_state: Premium and new arrivals at top — Rule 2 active (is_new_arrival OR price_band=premium boost for High Value Returning segment)
personas.personalisation_gap: Strong BRUID + 3 segment memberships + fresh signals. Pre-fix: rule inactive. Post-fix: full 1:1 personalisation active — this is the gold standard contrast against Guest.
